author_rating_explanation: Both authors are affiliated with Duke University, a reputable research institution. First author Tianhao Chen has moderate citation impact (316 citations, 20 papers). Duke University is a well-ranked university but not typically classified among the absolute top global AI labs/companies, placing this in the 7-8 range.
